name: Turkey-Orange Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the turkey, celery, salt, and curry powder in a bowl.
2. Peel and chop the orange.
3. Add the orange, grapes, and mayonnaise to the turkey mixture.
4. Gently toss to combine all ingredients.
5. Sprinkle the shredded coconut on top just before serving.
Note: This recipe provides 1/4 recipe serving details - 217 calories, 3 lean meat + 1 fruit exchange, 12 grams carbohydrate, 21 grams protein, 10 grams fat, 228 mg sodium, and 391 mg potassium. Cholesterol content is 58 mg. (Source: Am. Diabetes Assoc. Holiday Cookbook by Betty Wedman, 1986)
